note: Floor for regression: neither metric may drop more than 0.005 below these values. Eval uses us_only=True (production-aligned) with drop_interns=False/swe_only=False so it measures raw classifier quality, not scope filtering. Refreshed 2026-06-27: prior baseline (P=0.529, R=0.95) became stale as upstream regex changes tightened the classifier; this snapshot reflects current main.
